newly_discovered_papers.abstract_summary: What this is. A specification for governance-first context memory in autonomous AI agent systems. The contribution. ACM recognizes that agent memory is fundamentally an authorization problem and applies established access control patterns — the "authorization before action" principle common to RBAC, MAC, and capabil...
newly_discovered_papers.citation: Agent Context Memory: A Governance-First Specification for AI Agent Context Memory. Nils Wendelboe Holmager. 2026-06-21. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20785506
newly_discovered_papers.relevance_reason: Touches memory concepts that may be relevant if connected to agent behavior.
newly_discovered_papers.title: Agent Context Memory: A Governance-First Specification for AI Agent Context Memory
